iPhone・Androidの容量不足を解消！ストレージを空ける5つの方法と写真: Free Up Space on iPhone & Android: 5 Ways to Solve Storage Shortage and Back Up Your Photos
スマホの「ストレージの空き容量がありません」という警告に悩んでいませんか？本記事: Fed up with "Storage is full" warnings on your smartphone? This guide covers five practical ways to free up storage on iPhone and Android, plus how to back up and save important photos and videos safely.
スマホ 容量不足, iPhone ストレージ 増やす, Android 容量 空: smartphone storage full, free up iPhone storage, clear Android space, photo backup, clear cache
スマートフォンを使っていて、「ストレージの空き容量がありません」「システムメモリ: Have you ever seen "Out of storage space" or "System memory is running low" on your phone? If you take lots of photos and videos or keep installing new apps, it's easy to fill up your storage before you know it.
容量不足のままスマホを使い続けると、新しい写真が保存できなくなるだけでなく、アプ: Running your phone with too little storage doesn't just stop you from taking new photos — apps slow to a crawl, and in the worst case your phone may crash and fail to restart (a boot loop). This guide walks through 5 concrete steps to free up storage on both iPhone and Android, plus backup strategies to keep your data safe.
ステップ1：現在のストレージ使用状況を正確に把握する: Step 1: Check Exactly What's Taking Up Your Storage
まずは、何がスマホの容量を圧迫しているのかを確認しましょう。原因を知らずに対策を: Start by finding out what's eating your storage. Trying to fix the problem without knowing the cause is hit-or-miss.
「設定」アプリ ＞「一般」 ＞「iPhoneストレージ」の順にタップします。グラ: Go to Settings > General > iPhone Storage. A color-coded graph shows the breakdown by category — Photos, Apps, System, and so on — and a list ranks which apps are using the most space.
「設定」アプリ ＞「ストレージ」（または「デバイスケア」 ＞「ストレージ」）をタ: Go to Settings > Storage (or Device Care > Storage). Storage is broken down by category: images, videos, system, apps, and more.
ここで数GB以上の大容量を占めているアプリやファイル形式があれば、それが今回の整: If any app or file type is consuming several GB or more, that's your top priority for cleanup.
ステップ2：不要なアプリの削除と「一時キャッシュ」のクリーンアップ: Step 2: Delete Unused Apps and Clear Temporary Cache
使っていないアプリはアンインストールするのが基本ですが、日常的に使うアプリでも「: Uninstalling apps you no longer use is the obvious first step, but even apps you use every day can quietly accumulate gigabytes of "cache" — temporary data that doesn't need to stick around.
LINEやSNSアプリのキャッシュ削除：: Clear cache in LINE and social media apps:
特にLINEは、トーク内で送受信した写真や動画のキャッシュが数GBから数十GBに: LINE in particular can accumulate anywhere from a few GB to tens of GB of photo and video cache from your chats. You can safely remove expired cache from within the LINE app at Settings > Photos & Videos > Delete Data.
Safari（iPhone）は「設定」＞「Safari」＞「履歴とWebサイトデ: Clearing cache can free up hundreds of MB to several GB: on Safari (iPhone) go to Settings > Safari > Clear History and Website Data; on Chrome (Android/PC) use Clear browsing data in the app settings.
iPhoneには「非使用のAppを取り除く」という機能があります。これを使うと、: iPhone has an "Offload Unused Apps" feature that removes the app binary while keeping its data and settings intact, freeing up storage without losing anything important.
ステップ3：写真や動画の「ゴミ箱」を完全に空にする: Step 3: Permanently Empty the Photos Trash
不要な写真や動画を「削除」しただけでは、実はストレージは空きません。多くのスマホ: Simply deleting photos and videos doesn't actually free up storage right away. Most phones move deleted files to a "Trash" or "Recently Deleted" folder and keep them there for 30 days.
今すぐ容量を増やしたい場合は、写真アプリを開き、: To reclaim that space immediately, open the Photos app and:
「最近削除した項目」（iPhone）または「ゴミ箱」（Android）のフォルダ: Open the "Recently Deleted" (iPhone) or "Trash" (Android) folder and tap "Delete All"
してください。これにより、選択したデータが端末から完全に消去され、即座に空き容量: This permanently erases the files from your device and immediately frees up the space.
ステップ4：動画撮影の設定を見直す（予防策）: Step 4: Adjust Your Video Recording Settings (Prevention)
写真に比べて、動画（ムービー）は圧倒的にファイルサイズが大きくなります。特に最近: Videos take up far more space than photos. On a modern smartphone, just a few minutes of 4K/60fps footage can easily eat several GB of storage.
日常の記録であれば、「1080p HD / 30fps」などの標準的な画質に設定: For everyday recordings, dropping the setting to "1080p HD / 30fps" is a sensible compromise. On iPhone, go to Settings > Camera > Record Video; on Android, look in the camera app settings. This one change can dramatically slow down how quickly your storage fills up.
ステップ5：クラウドストレージやPCへ写真を退避・バックアップする: Step 5: Move or Back Up Photos to Cloud Storage or a PC
端末のデータを消したくないけれど容量を空けたい場合は、外部にデータを移動（退避）: If you don't want to delete anything but still need more space, the solution is to move your data somewhere external.
iCloud（Apple）やGoogleフォト、OneDriveなどを利用し、写: Services like iCloud, Google Photos, or OneDrive can automatically back up your photos to the cloud. Once the backup is complete, you can delete the full-resolution originals from your device (or let the service replace them with smaller, optimized versions), dramatically freeing up on-device storage.
PCを持っているなら、定期的にケーブルやWi-Fi経由でスマホのデータをPCのハ: If you have a PC, regularly transfer your phone's data to your computer's hard drive or an external SSD via cable or Wi-Fi.
スマホからPCへ、ケーブルなしで素早く写真を送るなら「FS!QR」: Send Photos from Your Phone to Your PC Without a Cable Using FS!QR
「クラウドストレージは月額料金がかかるし、PCに繋ぐケーブルを探すのも面倒……」: If you'd rather avoid cloud subscription fees and the hassle of hunting for a cable, the answer is a free, registration-free file-sharing service
スマホのブラウザからFS!QRにアクセスし、バックアップしたい写真や動画を選択し: Open FS!QR in your phone's browser, select the photos or videos you want to move, and upload them. A QR code and share link appear on screen — scan the QR code with your PC's camera, or open the link in a browser and enter the 6-digit password if one was set. Your files are saved to the PC. No app, no account, nothing to install. When your phone's storage hits the danger zone, you can offload everything to your PC on the spot. Make it part of your regular storage routine.
